title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Tata Consultancy Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Tata Consultancy Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Tata Consultancy Services has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Thane office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tata Consultancy Services:
Tata Consultancy Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Consultancy Services!
